lines.speaker: Dockmaster
lines.text: What can I do for you, [m'lady/sir]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do around here?

lines.speaker: Dockmaster
lines.text: It's my job to keep track of operations on the docks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there anything I can help out with?

lines.speaker: Dockmaster
lines.text: Thanks for the offer, but I'm afraid you need a higher crafting level before you can help me.

lines.speaker: Dockmaster
lines.text: You look like you know a thing or two about crafting, perhaps you could help us maintain the fishing cranes around the docks.

lines.speaker: Dockmaster
lines.text: You'll need a hammer, some nails and a few wooden planks, 3 planks per broken crane should be enough.

lines.speaker: Dockmaster
lines.text: I can't offer you any payment at the moment, but hard work doesn't go unnoticed around these parts.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure, I'll see what I can do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll let you get back to work.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I was just looking around.

lines.speaker: Dockmaster
lines.text: Please enter the answer to the question.

lines.speaker: Dockmaster
lines.text: I have a question for you.
